About

Operating Inside
the Signal Chain

DICHRO is an electronic music producer and founding Psyndica artist based in Austin, Texas.

His work moves across bass music, garage, drum & bass, and experimental electronic—built for night drives, warehouse systems, and headphones after midnight. Every element is deliberate. No wasted motion.

If this resonates, you already know where you belong.

ATX
Based

Psyndica Launch
Latest Release
Single · Psyndica

INGRESS

DICHRO × SCVRVB

Detailed percussion, sub-heavy grooves, and controlled tension pushed into a single focused transmission. Released through Psyndica.
